summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 3→Jul 9 vs Jun 26→Jul 2* · Revenue -18% (1,119,573 vs 1,372,621 EGP) · Spend -28% · ROAS 5.87 (+14%).
   • CPC: 2.78 → 2.22 EGP (-20%, down (good))
   • CVR: 1.32% → 1.12% (-15%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,086 → 1,160 EGP (+7%, up (good))
   *Read:* *CPC* fell -20%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *48,184 EGP of spend*.
     That drove ROAS +14%.
     Revenue -18% because spend -28%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was *BERCAU WITH BOW*, its CPC went 1.57 EGP→1.23 EGP on 16,058 EGP spend (~9% of the swing).

summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 3→Jul 9 vs Jun 26→Jul 2* · Revenue +98% (87,699 vs 44,310 EGP) · Spend +99% · ROAS 4.06 (-1%).
   • CPC: 7.58 → 9.42 EGP (+24%, up (drag))
   • CVR: 2.31% → 1.75% (-24%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,343 → 2,192 EGP (+63%, up (good))
   *Read:* *AOV* rose +63%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *33,960 EGP of revenue*.
     That drove ROAS -1%.
     Revenue +98% because spend +99%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was <https://business.facebook.com/adsmanager/manage/ads?act=336343742536460&selected_ad_ids=120254859180460011|Big personality catalogue   06-28>, its AOV went 2296.67 EGP→6334.0 EGP on 1,562 EGP spend (~24% of the swing).
